---
title: "Ömer Sümer"
image: images/profile.JPG
about:
  template: jolla
  image-width: 17em
  #image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/osuemer
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/omer-sumer/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/sumeromer
    - text: Scholar
      icon: google
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=h5sbUygAAAAJ&hl=en
format:
  html:
    link-external-icon: false
    link-external-newwindow: true
    comments: false
---

> <div style="text-align: left"> I am a postdoctoral associate in the Chair for Human-Centered Artificial Intelligence at the University of Augsburg. I am working on various topics in computer vision and machine learning. My particular interests are affective computing, accessibility (sign language recognition, translation and generation) and digital healthcare. </div>

<div style="text-align: left">   This website serves as a repository for my research notes, blog posts on small data science projects, and personal writings (mostly science communication, photography, hiking, and other outdoor activities). </div>
